mapper.select: select auc_no, auc_start_price, nvl(auc_finish_price,0) as auc_finish_price,to_char(auc_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as auc_start_date, to_char(auc_finish_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as auc_finish_date, auc_mem_id, con_author, con_product, con_width, con_height, con_year, con_etc, att_rename from auction join (select * from consignment join attachment on (con_no = att_bno) where att_category = 2 and att_fno = 1) on (auc_cno = con_no) where to_timestamp(sysdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= to_timestamp(auc_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') and to_timestamp(sysdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= to_timestamp(auc_finish_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') order by auc_no desc

select auc_no, auc_start_price, nvl(auc_finish_price,0) as auc_finish_price, to_char(auc_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as auc_start_date, to_char(auc_finish_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as auc_finish_date, auc_mem_id, con_author, con_product, con_width, con_height, con_year, con_etc, att_rename from auction join (select * from consignment join attachment on (con_no = att_bno) where att_category = 2 and att_fno = 1) on (auc_cno = con_no) where auc_no = #{aucNo}
select * from attachment where att_bno = #{aucNo} and att_status = 'Y' and att_category = 2 and (att_fno = 2 or att_fno = 3)
mapper.delete: delete from bidding_interest where auc_no = #{aucNo} and mem_id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select auc_no, auc_start_price, nvl(auc_finish_price,0) as auc_finish_price,to_timestamp(auc_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as auc_start_date, to_timestamp(auc_finish_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as auc_finish_date, auc_mem_id, con_author, con_product, con_width, con_height, con_year, con_etc, att_rename from auction join (select * from consignment join attachment on (con_no = att_bno) where att_category = 2) on (auc_no = con_no)
where to_timestamp(sysdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= to_timestamp(auc_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') and to_timestamp(sysdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= to_timestamp(auc_finish_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
where to_timestamp(sysdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') < to_timestamp(auc_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
where to_timestamp(sysdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') > to_timestamp(auc_finish_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and con_product = '%' || #{content} || '%'
and con_author = '%' || #{content} || '%'
and to_timestamp(auc_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= to_timestamp(#{aucSS}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and to_timestamp(auc_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= to_timestamp(#{aucSE}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and to_timestamp(auc_finish_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= to_timestamp(#{aucFS}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and to_timestamp(auc_finish_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= to_timestamp(#{aucFE}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
mapper.insert: insert into auction values(auc_seq.nextval, #{aucStartPrice}, null, to_timestamp(#{aucStartDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), to_timestamp(#{aucFinishDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #{aucNo}, null)
mapper.select: select * from attachment where att_bno = #{conNo} and (att_fno = 1 or att_fno = 2 or att_fno = 3)
